records.note: Same dry_run/audit-only gate as experiment_bridge_scoring_enabled -- see pier_bridge_overrides.py:448-453. Real-generation sweep cells never satisfy the gate, so this field is genuinely did_not_resolve for this sweep.

Context-gated, not a mapping bug: pier_bridge_overrides.py:448-453 forces experiment_enabled=False outside dry_run/audit_cfg.enabled. The mapped path (pier_bridge.experiments.bridge_scoring.enabled) IS what production reads in dry_run/audit context; the corridor sweep's cells are real generations (neither), so this field is genuinely did_not_resolve for this sweep.
